name: Urban Deluxe King
description: Bright suite with city view, workspace, and lounge area. Includes breakfast.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in

name: Signature Junior Suite
description: BA refined junior suite that combines a sleeping area and a compact lounge into one harmonious space. A great choice for guests who stay several nights and want a bit more room to relax, work or enjoy room service.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Connecting suites available for families (on request)

name: Classic Twin Retreat
description: A practical and well-appointed twin room designed for friends, colleagues, or guests who prefer separate beds. Thoughtful details and a calm interior make it suitable for both business and leisure stays.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Iron and ironing board available on request
Quiet wing option for light sleepers

name: Executive Corner Suite
description: A spacious corner suite created for guests who value privacy, comfort, and an elegant environment. Ideal for longer stays, special occasions or business trips that require a separate living space for meetings or relaxation.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Priority for late check-out (subject to availability)

name: Family Loft Room
description: A two-level family room designed for traveling families or small groups. Separate sleeping zones for adults and children create a sense of privacy while keeping everyone close together.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Baby cot, high chair, and step stool available on request
Child-friendly welcome set (colouring book, small toy, etc.)

name: Cozy Standard Double
description: A compact, thoughtfully arranged room with everything needed for a comfortable stay. Ideal for short city breaks or business trips.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Choice of firm or soft pillow on request
Some rooms available with courtyard aspect

name: Skyline Panorama Suite
description: A signature top-floor suite with sweeping views and generous space. Created for guests who want a memorable stay, whether for a celebration, a relaxed escape or an extended visit.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
extras: Priority for complimentary room upgrade, when available
Private in-room dinner or celebration set-up on request
